summary: Reviewed the FOUNDATION-001 monorepo baseline. The workspace manifests, Node/pnpm baseline, empty lockfile, root scripts, and hello-only package shells satisfy the no-gameplay foundation scope.

tests_run.result: On feat/foundation-001-monorepo-baseline; writer artifacts are uncommitted, with unrelated existing task/thread registry changes still present.
Confirmed repository file list; FOUNDATION-001 implementation surface is limited to root workspace files, apps/web, packages/core, tools/hello, and pnpm-lock.yaml.

tests_run.command: rg -n "(GameCommand|WorldState|sim-core|React|Pixi|Electron|vassal|army|district|polity|campaign|save|worker|monsoon|sovereign|季风|诸王|臣属|军|地区|势力|战役|存档)" package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml .node-version apps packages tools pnpm-lock.yaml
tests_run.result: Only package-name matches for monsoon were found; no gameplay, domain, worker, UI framework, save, or simulation implementation terms were present.

tests_run.command: rg -n "^(dependencies|devDependencies|optionalDependencies|peerDependencies):|\b(postinstall|preinstall|prepare)\b|https?://|git\+" package.json apps packages tools pnpm-lock.yaml
tests_run.result: No dependency blocks, install lifecycle scripts, remote URLs, or git dependencies were found.
v24.13.1 in the reviewer shell; package engines accept >=24 <25 and .node-version pins 24.17.0.
Scope: all 4 workspace projects; already up to date; completed successfully using pnpm v11.0.0.
Root check ran format:check, lint, typecheck, and test across apps/web, packages/core, and tools/hello; all hello-only scripts completed successfully.

decisions: ACCEPT: FOUNDATION-001 is a dependency-free monorepo baseline and does not introduce gameplay, domain systems, React, PixiJS, Electron, Worker code, saves, content, or simulation logic.

ACCEPT: pnpm-lock.yaml is treated as an expected FOUNDATION-001 artifact because AGENTS.md and docs/03-technology-stack.md require a pnpm workspace lockfile even though the current task allowed_paths list omits it.
ACCEPT: Deferring real TypeScript/Vite/ESLint/Vitest setup to later foundation tasks is consistent with the current empty-shell scope; FOUNDATION-001 check plumbing is present and reproducible.
risks: The reviewer shell is Node v24.13.1 while .node-version pins 24.17.0; this is not a blocker because package.json constrains Node to >=24 <25, but CI should use the pinned .node-version.
FOUNDATION-001 allowed_paths should be reconciled by lead_orchestrator to include pnpm-lock.yaml explicitly, since lockfile submission is required by project policy.
requested_action: Validate this ACCEPT review, reconcile the task allowed_paths lockfile wording if desired, and advance orchestration without marking the task ACCEPTED until the lead flow performs that state transition.
